a_image.alt: Psychedelic style mood board — Aesthetic · Mind-Expanding

sections.a_eyebrow: Bold Colors · Vibrant · Pattern-Heavy · Organic · Spiral
sections.a_description: Swirling rainbow gradients, organic flowing forms, and the cosmic visual language of 60s counterculture — Psychedelic design turns screens into portals for mind-expanding visual experiences. Hot magenta, electric green, and vivid purple blend and flow against deep purple backgrounds, creating the digital equivalent of concert posters for shows where the music melts into light and the walls breathe.

This consciousness-expanding style powers music festival promotional sites, vintage record store pages, art gallery exhibitions, and counterculture community platforms. You'll see it on psychedelic rock band sites, hemp product brands, music visualization apps, and retro poster shops — anywhere that the visual language needs to channel the era when art, music, and color dissolved the boundaries of conventional perception.

The swirling, color-saturated aesthetic of psychedelic design — flowing organic forms, rainbow gradients, and the mind-expanding visual language of 60s counterculture concert posters. Background: deep purple (#1a0030) — the cosmic void from which psychedelic visions emerge. The .inner panel has a gradient background (linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,0,128,0.15), rgba(0,255,128,0.15), rgba(128,0,255,0.15))) with a 1px border (rgba(255,0,128,0.3)) and 16px border-radius — swirling color on darkness. Colors: hot magenta (#ff0080) as the primary accent. Electric green (#00ff80) and vivid purple (#8000ff) as secondary. Off-white (#f0e8ff) for headings, muted lavender (#a890c0) for body text. The aesthetic is organic and flowing — letterforms melt, colors blend, and hard edges dissolve into waves. Set in Abril Fatface — a high-contrast display face with organic curves that echo the flowing lettering of psychedelic poster art. Heading at weight 400, 30px, line-height 1.2, color #f0e8ff. Eyebrow at weight 400, 11px, uppercase, 3px letter-spacing, color #ff0080. Body at weight 400, 15px, line-height 1.7, color #a890c0. Buttons: primary — magenta (#ff0080), white text, 50px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, green border (#00ff80). Alternatives: Playfair Display (high contrast), Yeseva One (organic curves).
{What this palette represents — the core identity}
